app.name: Lumina Influence AI
app.tagline: Stop burning budget on vanity metrics.
app.description: Influencer performance auditing powered by multimodal AI.

welcome.label: Stage 0 — Setup complete
welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: Front-end foundation is ready. Brand identity applied, i18n working, design tokens loaded.
welcome.fontDisplayDesc: Plus Jakarta Sans — used for headlines and display copy.
welcome.fontBodyDesc: Inter — used for body, labels and UI. This typeface balances readability and information density, ideal for an enterprise product.

colors.tertiary: Coral pink — alerts, danger, bot detection

ds.title: Design System
ds.subtitle: Internal component library for Lumina Influence AI. Use this page to validate variants, states and accessibility before shipping to product.
ds.label: Stage 1 — Base components
ds.modalBody: Pick a platform to start the official OAuth flow. Your credentials are never stored in plain text.

sections.buttonsDesc: Four official Figma variants: primary (with glow), secondary, inverted and outlined.
sections.iconButtonsDesc: Square rounded button for toolbars, topbars and compact actions.
sections.inputsDesc: Inputs with uppercase label, left icon and error state.
sections.searchDesc: Specialized variant for the header search field.
sections.cardsDesc: Default card and glassmorphism variant. Hoverable optional.
sections.kpisDesc: Composite indicator: label, large display value, % change and optional progress bar.
sections.badgesDesc: Semantic pills. Use organic/paid to differentiate traffic, danger for bot alerts.
sections.avatarsDesc: Circular with deterministic colored initials fallback.
sections.modalDesc: Blurred overlay, fade+scale animation, closes on ESC and overlay click.
sections.tooltipDesc: Simple hover/focus on all four positions.
sections.tabsDesc: Underline (with animated indicator) and pills (segmented control) variants.
sections.tableDesc: Header with uppercase label, soft hover and custom render support.
sections.skeletonDesc: Placeholder with shimmer while data is loading.
sections.statusDesc: Pulsing indicator and language switcher for topbars.
sections.progressDesc: Brand gradient and danger gradient variants.
